description: "Hard-edge theme with square corners and strong borders"

# Concrete Theme

A hard-edge preset with square corners, bold borders, high-contrast surfaces, and assertive typography.

> `hardline()` is still available as a backward-compatible alias, but `concrete()` is the preferred name for new projects.

## Usage

```tsx title="docs.config.ts"
import { defineDocs } from "@farming-labs/docs";
import { concrete } from "@farming-labs/theme/concrete";

export default defineDocs({
  entry: "docs",
  theme: concrete(),
});
```

```css title="app/global.css"
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@farming-labs/theme/concrete/css";
```

## Defaults

| Property      | Value                               |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| Primary       | `#ffd335`                           |
| Background    | `#f2efe8` (light), `#0f0f10` (dark) |
| Border radius | `0px`                               |
| Content width | 860px                               |
| Sidebar width | 300px                               |

## Customizing

```tsx title="customizing.tsx"
theme: concrete({
  ui: {
    colors: { primary: "#ffb703" },
    layout: { sidebarWidth: 320 },
  },
}),
```
